title: Anticheat
description: A simple anti-cheat that forces player to use only whitelisted mods and resource packs.
body:
# Anticheat

**Disclaimer: This mod can "easily" be bypassed. So use it only for your private server with your "non-tech friends" 😉**

The mod allows you to set a whitelist for mods and resource packs. The client can't change their resource pack while he is on the server. There is also the possibility of adding instant-ban mods/resource packs that ban a player instantly if he uses a specific mod.
